candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Specific non-current asset line, not total current assets.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet total current assets line.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported balance sheet total.

candidates.why: Best balance sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents; restricted cash should generally be excluded from CHE.
Restricted cash is usually not the primary CHE measure.

candidates.row_label: Non restricted cash and cash equivalents at end of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance, but balance sheet cash line is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Non restricted cash and cash equivalents at beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not period-end balance sheet CHE.
Not a stock of cash and cash equivalents.

variables.notes: Used non-restricted cash only; excluded restricted cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported balance sheet total.

candidates.why: Appears in the current liabilities section and best matches short-term/current debt. Excludes leases by label.
Semantically very strong for current debt, but preview values are blank and it may be a duplicate/supplemental line.
Likely broader borrowings line in non-current liabilities section, so not short-term debt.
Operating liability, not debt.

variables.notes: Chosen as the current debt line because it sits within the current liabilities section. Did not use 'Borrowings' since that appears in the non-current section, and did not use blank 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' to avoid uncertainty.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet taxes payable/current tax liability line.
Cash flow movement, not the balance sheet payable stock.

variables.notes: Direct payable line selected from balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance sheet PPE line and preferred net/total PPE measure.
Only a component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation - Property, Plant & Equipment - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Impairment - Property, Plant & Equipment including Intangible Assets - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Cash flow reconciliation item, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Realized G/L on Fixed Assets (PPE & Intangibles)
candidates.why: Gain/loss item, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Amortization - Intangible Assets excluding Goodwill - Cash Flow - to Reconcile
candidates.why: Not PPE stock.
Not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected exact PPE balance sheet line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported balance sheet total.

candidates.why: Direct operating cash flow line; best match for net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Net cash used in investing activities
candidates.why: Investing cash flow, not operating.

candidates.row_label: Net cash used in financing activities
candidates.why: Financing cash flow, not operating.

variables.notes: Chosen as the direct net cash flow from operating activities line.
